name: pr_bd_g1
drl:
rule "R2"
salience 4
agenda-group "ga"
when
    $p : T1(f0 == 1.5)
then
    modify($p) { setF1(9.0) }
end
rule "R6"
salience 2
agenda-group "ga"
when
    T0()
then
    insert(new T1(7.0, 3.0, true, false));
end
rule "W"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    T1($x : f1)
    accumulate(T0(f0 == "zz"); $n : count())
then
end
rule "R5"
when
    T0($y : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
end
_finding: order-pin GUARD (D-262 deliverable): the oldest fact t1a is UPDATED (re-staged) between the peek and W's pop, plus a fresh insert. Reverse-fact-insertion, reverse-staging, and seq-sort pins all disagree here; only a genuine deferred lazy evaluation at the pop reproduces the oracle.
